positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene at dawn. Giant bioluminescent mushrooms glow softly, surrounded by delicate ferns and a friendly, anthropomorphic fox wearing a tiny backpack. Style of Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, highly detailed, soft volumetric lighting, deep saturation, concept art, clean vector lines.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy lines, grayscale, monochrome
